videos.title: NYC Fashion Show 2025
videos.story: Highlights from the 2025 NYC Fashion Show. I wish I could attend it every year!

videos.title: Bird Feeding at O'Reilly's 2023
videos.story:
In February 2023, we traveled to Brisbane, Australia.

One of the fun moments was feeding colorful parrots at O’Reilly’s Rainforest Retreat in Lamington National Park.

The parrots were so friendly — they perched right on our heads and shoulders while we held out food, making the experience both exciting and magical.
